name: Gingham Plaid Shower Curtain Blue - Threshold™
description:
Elevate the look of your bathroom with this Traditional Gingham Plaid Shower Curtain from Threshold™. This decorative shower curtain features a gingham check print in white and blue with a contrasting rust and blue border for classic style. Made from cotton-recycled polyester blend fabric, this printed shower curtain features a buttonhole top for quick installation, while the machine-washable design allows for easy cleaning when needed.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
